commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent bootstrap resolution so explicitly configured per-agent `agentDir` files can override same-named workspace bootstrap files, adds focused tests, and also adds root helper/proof files plus a shrinkwrap change.

PR surface: Source +15, Tests +103, Docs +58, Other +8114. Total +8290 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and v2026.6.10 build bootstrap context from `workspaceDir` only while runtime callers already pass `agentId`; I did not run a live OpenClaw session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide the prompt-authority policy and the contributor needs to remove unrelated artifacts and supply real-run proof; automation cannot supply that proof for an external branch.
